title: Blackbane Nail
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:BlackbaneNail.png|thumb|right|200px|The Blackbane Nail]]
The '''Blackbane Nail''' was a primitive [[Dagger/Legends|knife]] used by [[Sayormi]] witches. They were infamous for their skills with this weapon, using it to fend off enemies while preparing their [[Death/Legends|deadly]] magical abilities.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Donkuwah knife]] and the Blackbane Nail are represented by identical 3-D models.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
